summary: Completed frontend-only e2e testing for Iteration 2 of Effective Mathematicians site. All 16 requested verifications pass: site loads without console/page errors; header logo wordmark renders 'Effective' in orange rgb(234,88,12) and 'Mathematicians' in black rgb(28,25,23); desktop nav contains exactly [Home, Learn, About, Contact] with 'Take Action' ONLY as right-side pill CTA (data-testid=header-cta-take-action); Learn dropdown opens on hover and shows Problem Profiles + Resources links; mobile menu toggles and Take Action CTA appears at bottom; hero video present with real-people Pexels footage (pexels.com/video-files/3209828); marquee, em-underline-hand italic emphasis present on home; 3 cause cards on home open modal on 'Learn more' click with image+tag+title+blurb, Escape key closes modal, NO ITN numerical scoring anywhere; 4 begin-step zigzag items present; /learn/cause-areas shows 8 profile cards with images — clicking opens a modal containing image, tag (e.g., 'TOP PRIORITY'), title, prose, 'Open work' bullets, and Get involved button, close works; NO ITN scores anywhere; /learn/resources shows 24 cards each with image thumbnail, all 6 filters (all/book/article/website/podcast/course) + search work (book=6, search '80000' => 1); /about theory-of-change has 9 paragraphs with orange serif-display drop cap on first paragraph; 8 partners present with hover-scale class; /take-action shows forum-hero-cta linking to https://github.com/effective-mathematicians/forum with target=_blank, alternating way-0..way-3 image-circle rows, inline house-rules, bottom-forum-cta present; /contact form (name/email/topic(select)/message) submits to form-success-state and form-reset restores; grid-paper class is completely absent on every page tested; scroll-to-top + navigation works across all routes. No console errors captured during any run.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor naming inconsistency: partner data-testids are slug-generated as e.g. 'partner-80,000-hours' (with a literal comma) rather than 'partner-80000-hours' as documented in the review request's testid list. It still matches the 'partner-<name>' pattern and all 8 partners render correctly, but if automated tests rely on the documented exact testid, update the slug generator to strip commas. Non-blocking.
Contact form remains frontend-only prototype per explicit user request — verified as a client-side state transition (submit → form-success-state, reset → form restored). Expected, NOT a bug.
Hero video uses Pexels-hosted MP4 (external CDN). Confirmed loading; no fallback poster verified in this run — consider adding a poster image for slow networks.
No grid-paper backgrounds anywhere (0 elements across Home, CauseAreas, Resources, About, TakeAction, Contact) — user's removal requirement fully satisfied.

All critical data-testids from the review request are present and wired. Modals open/close via Learn more button, close button, and Escape key (verified on both Home cards and CauseAreas profile cards).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 changes all verified. Logo: 'Effective' orange (rgb 234,88,12), 'Mathematicians' near-black (rgb 28,25,23). Hero video: Pexels 3209828 real-people notebook footage. Modal flow works on both home sneak-peek cards and /learn/cause-areas profile cards via Learn more button click, modal-close click, and Escape key. ITN scoring is completely absent globally. Partner testid slug includes comma for '80,000 Hours' → 'partner-80,000-hours' (cosmetic, not a blocker). Resources filter counts unchanged from iter 1: book=6, podcast=4, course=2, etc. /learn/resources is at path /learn/resources.
